tasks.title: Backfill ending $10K engagement
tasks.description: Client B engagement ending soon. Identify replacement prospect or convert Client B to retainer.

tasks.title: Assess Client A for Phase 2 readiness
tasks.description: Client A is in Phase 1 at $24K. Check if Month 2 has passed for Phase 2 introduction.

tasks.title: Draft 3 LinkedIn posts for this week
tasks.description: Content lanes: strategy in people vs systems, quiet burnout, boards seeking stability. Follow Brand & Voice Playbook.

tasks.title: Scan nonprofit news for outreach opportunities
tasks.description: Check Chronicle of Philanthropy, NonProfit Times for leadership transitions, funding shifts, and org instability signals.

tasks.title: Build prospect pipeline tracker
tasks.description: Create tracking system for all prospects with stage, next action, and revenue potential.

tasks.title: Update revenue projections for Q2
tasks.description: Recalculate monthly run rate with current 3 clients and project Q2 based on pipeline.

tasks.title: Identify 5 ICP-matched nonprofits for outreach
tasks.description: $750K-$3M nonprofits, small team, execution-ready but capacity constrained. Research via LinkedIn and sector databases.

tasks.title: Draft outreach email templates
tasks.description: Create 3 brand-aligned outreach templates for different ICP segments. No pitching. Relational tone. Follow playbook.

tasks.title: Set up weekly strategy review cadence
tasks.description: Configure Monday 10 AM automated strategy review in Discord and Slack.

tasks.title: Configure daily briefing automation
tasks.description: Set up 9 AM daily briefing in Discord and Slack with revenue snapshot and priorities.

tasks.title: Deploy Elara to Discord and Slack
tasks.description: Build and deploy Claude-powered executive AI bot to both Discord and Slack with full command set.

tasks.title: Revenue floor analysis and Client B replacement strategy
tasks.description: Calculate exact revenue gap from Client B ending. Model pipeline requirements to maintain $15K monthly floor. Identify specific prospect targets and outreach volume needed.

tasks.title: Client A Phase 2 readiness assessment
tasks.description: Review Client A's Month 2 progress against Phase 1 deliverables. Prepare Phase 2 introduction framework and pricing recommendation for LaToya's client conversation.

tasks.title: Pipeline prospect research and qualification
tasks.description: Identify 15 nonprofits matching ICP ($750K-$3M budget, capacity constraints, execution-ready). Research decision makers, recent challenges, and connection pathways.

tasks.title: Weekly revenue tracking and projection update
tasks.description: Update March revenue actuals against $15K floor target. Project Q2 pipeline conversion scenarios. Flag any cash flow concerns or opportunities.

tasks.title: LinkedIn content calendar for March
tasks.description: Create 8 LinkedIn posts focused on nonprofit capacity building, Storm Scale insights, and strategic positioning. Align messaging with Phase 1 engagement demand generation.

tasks.title: Strategic outreach sequence for qualified prospects
tasks.description: Develop 3-touch outreach framework for warm prospects. Craft templates that lead with capacity diagnosis, not service pitches. Prepare for LaToya's review and personalization.

tasks.title: Client B transition and testimonial capture
tasks.description: Complete final deliverables review with Client B. Document case study elements and secure testimonial for future business development. Ensure clean engagement closure.

tasks.title: Phase 2 service refinement and pricing validation
tasks.description: Review Phase 2 Systems Embedding structure against Client A's emerging needs. Validate $24K pricing point and identify potential scope adjustments for future engagements.

tasks.title: Retainer service positioning and prospect identification
tasks.description: Define Regenerative Leadership Retainer positioning for current pipeline. Identify which prospects might prefer ongoing support over project engagements.

tasks.title: Client A Month 2 check-in and Phase 2 introduction
tasks.description: Conduct scheduled client conversation to review Phase 1 progress, address any capacity gaps, and introduce Phase 2 Systems Embedding as natural next step.

tasks.title: Revenue Floor Analysis - Week of March 10
tasks.description: Calculate current monthly revenue run rate, identify gap to $15K floor, and model scenarios for closing the gap before Client B engagement ends

tasks.title: Client A Phase 2 Readiness Assessment
tasks.description: Evaluate Client A's progress at Month 2 mark, document Phase 1 wins, and prepare Phase 2 introduction framework for LaToya to present

tasks.description: Review Client B engagement status, document deliverables completed, and prepare closeout process with potential retainer conversion assessment

tasks.title: LinkedIn thought leadership content batch
tasks.description: Create 5 brand-aligned posts focusing on nonprofit capacity building, systems thinking, and storm-scale positioning. No hype or urgency framing.

tasks.description: Identify 15 nonprofits matching ICP criteria. Focus on organizations showing execution readiness but capacity constraints. Prepare preliminary Storm Scale assessments.

tasks.description: Refine Phase 2 messaging and pricing ($22K-$30K range). Ensure seamless transition narrative from Phase 1 infrastructure to Phase 2 systems embedding.

tasks.title: Client C engagement health check
tasks.description: Review Client C's $7,700 engagement progress. Assess deliverable timeline, client satisfaction, and potential for service expansion or retainer conversion.

tasks.title: Regenerative Leadership Retainer prospect identification
tasks.description: Identify 5 potential retainer clients from existing network. Focus on organizations needing ongoing strategic support at $2.5K-$3.5K monthly range.

tasks.title: Q2 pipeline strategy session
tasks.description: Strategic planning session to model Q2 revenue pathway. Review 90-day engagement cycles, capacity constraints, and $1M annual target progress. Requires Latoya's strategic input.

callIntelligence.name: Call Intelligence
capabilities: Filter calls to LUR Growth and NPTA only (skip NBN interviews)
Cross-reference attendees with GHL contacts and Gmail history
Score calls 1-10 on rapport, clarity, next steps, objection handling
Flag missed opportunities (referral asks, Phase 2 proposals)
Generate personalized follow-up messages tied to call moments
Provide coaching notes with specific improvement examples
Auto-assign follow-up tasks to Victor or Grace based on outcome

activity.detail: Built and deployed call analysis engine. Filters LUR/NPTA calls, scores 1-10, generates follow-ups, auto-assigns tasks to Victor/Grace
